emails.subject: UAE - LM6000 deal
emails.body: Ben, would appreciate if I could get a copy of your model to make sure the assumptions captured in your model are consistent with the one's I will use in pricing the deal. Thanks Gautam Forwarded by Gautam Gupta/HOU/ECT on 02/22/2000 01:47 PM Claire Broido 02/22/2000 01:42 PM

emails.subject: Re: UAE - LM6000 deal
emails.body: Re: UAE LM6000 deal Here are the assumptions you will need: VOM: $2.23 H.R.: 10,400 Cost/Start: $257.00 Power Curve: Nepool Start Date: 6/1/01 Gas Curve: Transco Zone 6 Need: 4 and 5 year capacity numbers ($/kW-mo.) on a yearly basis Give me a call if you need any more information. Thanks Ben
